z1Exception classes for marshmallow-related errors.

_schemac
MarshmallowErrorz.Base class for all marshmallow-related errors.N
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
__doc__
:/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/marshmallow/exceptions.pyr
ValidationErrora
Raised when validation fails on a field or schema.
    Validators and custom fields should raise this exception.
    :param message: An error message, list of error messages, or dict of
        error messages. If a dict, the keys are subitems and the values are error messages.
    :param field_name: Field name to store the error on.
        If `None`, the error is stored as schema-level error.
    :param data: Raw input data.
    :param valid_data: Valid (de)serialized data.
    Nz
str | list | dict
strzYtyping.Mapping[str, typing.Any] | typing.Iterable[typing.Mapping[str, typing.Any]] | Nonez:list[dict[str, typing.Any]] | dict[str, typing.Any] | None)
message
field_name
data
valid_datac
isinstancer

	__class__r	
ValidationError.__init__c
SCHEMAr
dict
normalized_messages-
z#ValidationError.normalized_messagesz

returnc
Nz9cannot access 'messages_dict' when 'messages' is of type )
	TypeError
typer
messages_dict2
ValidationError.messages_dict)
propertyr"
__classcell__r	
RegistryErrorzXRaised when an invalid operation is performed on the serializer
    class registry.
    Nr
StringNotCollectionErrorzBRaised when a string is passed when a list of strings is expected.Nr
FieldInstanceResolutionErrorzLRaised when schema to instantiate is neither a Schema class nor an instance.Nr
